idea.title: Cargo Jam
idea.hook: Tap arrow-crates to slide them off a packed dock — catch 3 of a color in the tray before it overflows.
idea.prototype: Portrait canvas puzzle: a packed dock board of colored crates each printed with a direction arrow; tap a crate -> it slides along its arrow until blocked or off-board; off-board crates land in a 7-slot tray; 3 same-color auto-ship with a pop; tray full with no match = level fail; clear the board = win. 24 hand-tuned LEVEL-MAP levels with star ratings + escalating crate types (ice/locked, long 1x2, chained pair, rainbow wildcard, bomb, conveyor rows) introduced every ~2 levels, plus an endless randomized mode after the map. Non-timer pressure = 7-slot tray scarcity; combo streak rewards clean play.
idea.mutation_of: Block Out / Tap Out arrow-escape jam family
idea.why_novel: first arrow-escape + color-tray jam in the portfolio; flattens the $300K/day mobile cluster to 2D vanilla canvas

sources.title: Block Out by Grand Games is scaling to over $300K a day
sources.snippet: Block Out by Grand Games is scaling to $300K+/day. It doesn't have an Android version! It's an iteration of a 2024 game.

synthesizer_brief: Daily-mix slots were empty (no opportunities file); leader synthesized the SIGNAL pick from the digest's strongest market evidence (Block Out $300K/day) + today's dominant puzzle_objects CTR archetype + portfolio rule that tactile clear-goal puzzles work while abstract ones get downvoted.
